svg.title: BSC Dedicated RPC and Mempool System Flow
svg.desc: Complete architecture and implementation flow for a BSC dedicated RPC mempool node optimized for sniping
svg.text: BSC dedicated RPC + mempool — sniping architecture

g.text: HTTP :8545 · WS :8546 · P2P :30303 — all bound to 127.0.0.1 (except P2P)
journalctl -u bsc -f → monitor sync to head block
SSL via certbot · password auth disabled · fail2ban active
txpool_content() — full pending pool scan (50ms polling fallback)
eth_blockNumber() — lag check · eth_gasPrice() — gas strategy
Target latency: tx hash visible < 100ms from broadcast
Success: synced to head · txpool pending > 0 · WS latency < 100ms · API key auth working
